---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement

A clear and concise description of the problem you'd like solved. For example: "I'm frustrated when [...]"

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature or enhancement you'd like to see. Be specific about behavior, interactions, and output.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've thought about.

## Use Case

Describe when and how you would use this feature. Real-world scenarios are helpful.

## Scope

- [ ] This feature should work from all three access points (popup, context menu, keyboard shortcut)
- [ ] This feature requires new permissions (list them)
- [ ] This feature changes existing behavior

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.
